name: A1
headline: Discovery Foundations
summary: Build the core system: sounds, survival phrases, and high-frequency grammar for daily interactions.

whoFor.title: Who is this for?
whoFor.description: Perfect for absolute beginners with no prior German knowledge.

bullets.title: Travel Enthusiasts
bullets.description: Prepare for your first trip to German-speaking countries.

curriculumHighlights.subtitle: Module 01
curriculumHighlights.title: Pronunciation & Sound System
curriculumHighlights.description: Master German phonetics with our unique sound mapping system. Learn to distinguish and produce all German sounds with native-like precision.

curriculumHighlights.title: Conversational Basics
curriculumHighlights.description: Build confidence in everyday situations through role-play and real-life scenarios. Order food, introduce yourself, and navigate simple interactions.

testimonial.quote: A1 was the foundation I needed. The pronunciation training completely changed how I approach German.
testimonial.author: Maria Garcia

capabilities.title: Basic Communication
capabilities.description: Handle simple conversations about familiar topics like family, work, and hobbies.

capabilities.title: Reading Comprehension
capabilities.description: Understand short, simple texts and basic advertisements.

capabilities.title: Cultural Awareness
capabilities.description: Recognize basic cultural norms and etiquette in German-speaking countries.

readyToMaster.headline: Ready to Start Your German Journey?
readyToMaster.description: Join our A1 cohort and take your first steps toward German fluency. Perfect for absolute beginners.

quote.text: A1 was the foundation I needed. The pronunciation training completely changed how I approach German.
quote.author: Maria Garcia

assessment.notes: Focus on comprehension and basic production.

name: A2
headline: Waystage Momentum
summary: Expand your range: more contexts, more verbs, and smoother listening in everyday situations.

whoFor.title: Who is this for?
whoFor.description: Designed for learners who have completed A1 or have basic German knowledge.

bullets.title: A1 Graduates
bullets.description: Build on your foundation and expand your vocabulary.

bullets.title: Travel & Work
bullets.description: Prepare for more complex travel and basic work scenarios.

prerequisite.title: Prerequisite
prerequisite.description: Completion of Level A1 or equivalent knowledge.

outcomes: Follow slow, clear speech on familiar topics

curriculumHighlights.subtitle: Grammar Deep Dive
curriculumHighlights.title: Master the Cases
curriculumHighlights.description: Understand the logic behind Nominative, Accusative, and Dative cases through visual learning aids and real-world examples.

curriculumHighlights.title: Travel & Culture
curriculumHighlights.description: Practical German for traveling through Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. Learn to navigate airports, hotels, and restaurants with confidence.

testimonial.quote: The travel-focused lessons made me confident enough to book my first trip to Berlin and actually speak German!
testimonial.author: James Wilson

capabilities.title: Independent Travel
capabilities.description: Navigate German-speaking countries confidently using the language.

capabilities.title: Simple Storytelling
capabilities.description: Describe past experiences and future plans with basic narrative structures.

capabilities.title: Professional Basics
capabilities.description: Handle simple workplace communications and understand basic job-related vocabulary.

readyToMaster.headline: Ready to Build Momentum?
readyToMaster.description: Take your German to the next level. A2 opens doors to real conversations and deeper connections.

quote.text: The travel-focused lessons made me confident enough to book my first trip to Berlin and actually speak German!
quote.author: James Wilson

name: B1
headline: Threshold Independence
summary: Become independent: speak with confidence, understand real conversations, and write structured messages.

whoFor.title: Who is this for?
whoFor.description: This level is designed for learners who have mastered the basics of German (A2) and are ready to tackle professional and academic environments.

bullets.title: Career Climbers
bullets.description: Professionals aiming for employment in DACH region companies.

bullets.title: Academic Pursuits
bullets.description: Students preparing for German university entrance or internships.

prerequisite.title: Prerequisite
prerequisite.description: Completion of Level A2 or equivalent placement test score.

curriculumHighlights.subtitle: Module 01
curriculumHighlights.title: Advanced Grammar & Logic
curriculumHighlights.description: Mastering the Passive Voice, Subjunctive I (Konjunktiv I), and connector logic for precise, professional German syntax.

curriculumHighlights.title: Professional Vocabulary
curriculumHighlights.description: Transition from “restaurant German” to boardroom German with sector-specific terminology and workplace scenarios.

curriculumHighlights.title: Cultural Nuances
curriculumHighlights.description: Understand “Du vs. Sie” in modern contexts and the art of German directness in professional settings.

curriculumHighlights.title: Oral Fluency & Spontaneity
curriculumHighlights.description: Intensive speaking workshops focused on debating, presenting, and expressing complex emotions without hesitation.

testimonial.quote: B1 was the moment I stopped translating in my head and started feeling the language.
testimonial.author: Sarah Koenig

outcomes: Understand standard speech and key points

capabilities.title: Workplace Agility
capabilities.description: Participate in business meetings and handle professional correspondence with clarity and proper etiquette.

capabilities.title: Textual Analysis
capabilities.description: Understand the main points of complex technical texts in your field of specialization and standard news reports.

capabilities.title: Abstract Thought
capabilities.description: Express viewpoints on contemporary issues, giving advantages and disadvantages of various options.

capabilities.title: Social Sophistication
capabilities.description: Navigate most travel and social situations in German‑speaking countries with spontaneous fluency.

readyToMaster.headline: Ready to Master B1?
readyToMaster.description: Join our next cohort — limited seats to ensure personalized feedback and rapid progress.

quote.text: B1 was the moment I stopped translating in my head and started feeling the language.
quote.author: Sarah Koenig

assessment.notes: This level emphasizes independence and structured output.

name: B2
headline: Vantage Fluency
summary: Sound natural: complex grammar, better vocabulary, and confident interaction in professional contexts.

whoFor.title: Who is this for?
whoFor.description: For learners ready to achieve professional fluency in German.

bullets.title: Professionals
bullets.description: Advance your career in German-speaking environments.

bullets.title: University Bound
bullets.description: Prepare for academic studies in German.

prerequisite.title: Prerequisite
prerequisite.description: Completion of Level B1 or equivalent.

outcomes: Understand most TV/news on familiar topics

curriculumHighlights.subtitle: Professional Communication
curriculumHighlights.title: Business German Mastery
curriculumHighlights.description: Navigate complex professional scenarios, lead meetings, and deliver compelling presentations in German.

curriculumHighlights.title: Media Literacy
curriculumHighlights.description: Analyze news articles, opinion pieces, and professional publications. Understand subtle arguments and implied meanings.

testimonial.quote: B2 gave me the confidence to present to German clients. Now I lead meetings entirely in German.
testimonial.author: Thomas Müller

capabilities.title: Professional Fluency
capabilities.description: Lead professional discussions and present complex ideas with confidence.

capabilities.title: Nuanced Expression
capabilities.description: Express opinions with appropriate register and subtlety for different contexts.

capabilities.title: Academic Readiness
capabilities.description: Prepare for university-level study in German-speaking institutions.

readyToMaster.headline: Ready to Reach Fluency?
readyToMaster.description: B2 is your gateway to professional and academic opportunities in German-speaking countries.

quote.text: B2 gave me the confidence to present to German clients. Now I lead meetings entirely in German.
quote.author: Thomas Müller

name: C1
headline: Advanced Competence
summary: Operate at a high level: nuanced speech, academic/professional writing, and strong comprehension.

whoFor.title: Who is this for?
whoFor.description: For advanced learners aiming for academic or executive-level proficiency.

bullets.title: University Applicants
bullets.description: Prepare for German university entrance requirements.

prerequisite.title: Prerequisite
prerequisite.description: Completion of Level B2 or equivalent.

curriculumHighlights.subtitle: Academic Excellence
curriculumHighlights.title: University-Level German
curriculumHighlights.description: Master academic writing, research papers, and seminar participation required for German universities.

testimonial.quote: C1 prepared me for my Master's at LMU Munich. I can now follow lectures and participate in seminars naturally.
testimonial.author: Dr. Anna Weber

capabilities.title: Academic Proficiency
capabilities.description: Study at German universities and participate fully in academic discourse.

capabilities.title: Executive Communication
capabilities.description: Communicate at executive level with sophisticated vocabulary and cultural awareness.

readyToMaster.headline: Ready to Master Advanced German?
readyToMaster.description: C1 opens doors to top-tier academic programs and executive positions.

quote.text: C1 prepared me for my Master's at LMU Munich. I can now follow lectures and participate in seminars naturally.
quote.author: Dr. Anna Weber

name: C2
headline: Mastery & Control
summary: Near-native control: advanced nuance, idioms, and confident performance across any domain.

whoFor.title: Who is this for?
whoFor.description: For learners seeking native-level mastery for professional or personal excellence.

bullets.title: Language Professionals
bullets.description: Achieve native-level proficiency for teaching or translation.

bullets.title: Cultural Ambassadors
bullets.description: Master the subtleties of German culture and communication.

prerequisite.title: Prerequisite
prerequisite.description: Completion of Level C1 or equivalent mastery.

curriculumHighlights.subtitle: Native-Like Mastery
curriculumHighlights.title: Idiomatic & Stylistic Excellence
curriculumHighlights.description: Achieve near-native command of German idioms, regional variations, and sophisticated stylistic choices.

testimonial.quote: C2 transformed my German from functional to native-like. I now think, dream, and debate in German.
testimonial.author: Michael Chen

capabilities.title: Native-Level Competence
capabilities.description: Function at the highest level in any professional, academic, or social context.

capabilities.title: Cultural Mastery
capabilities.description: Navigate complex cultural nuances with the sophistication of a native speaker.

readyToMaster.headline: Ready to Achieve Mastery?
readyToMaster.description: C2 represents the pinnacle of German language proficiency. Join our elite cohort.
